_ax.set_ylabel(%22%24y%24%22%2C%20rotation%3D0)%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_ax.grid(True%2C%20alpha%3D0.3)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_fig.suptitle(%22Jeux%20de%20donn%C3%A9es%20polynomiaux%20bruit%C3%A9s%20(degr%C3%A9%201%20%C3%A0%206)%22%2C%20fontsize%3D14)%0A%20%20%20%20_fig.tight_layout()%0A%20%20%20%20_fig%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell(hide_code%3DTrue)%0Adef%20_(mo)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20mo.md(r%22%22%22%0A%20%20%20%20Cette%20approche%20a%20ses%20limites%2C%20on%20constate%20qu'on%20a%20vite%20fait%20de%20confondre%20un%20polyn%C3%B4me%20de%20degr%C3%A9%206%20avec%20un%20polyn%C3%B4me%20de%20degr%C3%A9%203.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Mais%20on%20ne%20confondrait%20pas%20une%20droite%20affine%20avec%20un%20polyn%C3%B4me%20de%20degr%C3%A9%202%20%3A%20puisque%20cette%20visualisation%20ne%20co%C3%BBte%20rien%2C%20autant%20ne%20pas%20s'en%20priver.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20---%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%20D.%20Erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20vs.%20erreur%20de%20validation%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Intuition%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Le%20ph%C3%A9nom%C3%A8ne%20d'overfitting%20survient%20lorsqu'un%20mod%C3%A8le%20%C2%AB%20colle%20%C2%BB%20trop%20aux%20donn%C3%A9es%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%2C%20au%20point%20que%20sa%20capacit%C3%A9%20de%20pr%C3%A9diction%20face%20%C3%A0%20des%20donn%C3%A9es%20jamais%20rencontr%C3%A9es%20soit%20d%C3%A9grad%C3%A9e.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Intuitivement%2C%20sa%20propension%20%C3%A0%20coller%20aux%20donn%C3%A9es%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20s'observe%20lorsqu'on%20demande%20au%20mod%C3%A8le%20de%20pr%C3%A9dire%20la%20variable%20cible%20d'une%20instance%20sur%20laquelle%20il%20a%20%C3%A9t%C3%A9%20entra%C3%AEn%C3%A9.%20C'est%20l'**erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Une%20erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20faible%20ne%20signifie%20pas%20forc%C3%A9ment%20que%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20overfitte%20%3B%20peut-%C3%AAtre%20que%20notre%20mod%C3%A8le%20est%20tr%C3%A8s%20performant%20et%20que%20le%20training%20set%20est%20peu%20bruit%C3%A9.%20Il%20faut%20mettre%20cette%20erreur%20en%20**perspective**%20avec%20la%20qualit%C3%A9%20de%20ses%20pr%C3%A9dictions%20sur%20des%20donn%C3%A9es%20qu'il%20n'a%20**jamais%20vues**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Cette%20derni%C3%A8re%20mesure%20s'obtient%20typiquement%20gr%C3%A2ce%20%C3%A0%20un%20entra%C3%AEnement%20par%20validation%20crois%C3%A9e%20%20(voir%20chapitre%202)%2C%20%C3%A0%20l'issue%20duquel%20on%20obtient%20une%20mesure%20de%20la%20capacit%C3%A9%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20%3A%20l'**erreur%20de%20validation**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20appelle%20parfois%20**%C3%A9cart%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation**%20la%20diff%C3%A9rence%20entre%20les%20deux%20erreurs.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Visualisation%20%3Ca%20id%3D%22visualisation-ecart-generalisation%22%3E%3C%2Fa%3E%0A%0A%20%20%20%20La%20visualisation%20interactive%20ci-dessous%20illustre%20ce%20principe.%0A%20%20%20%20%22%22%22)%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell(hide_code%3DTrue)%0Adef%20_(mo)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20overfit_degree_slider%20%3D%20mo.ui.slider(%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20start%3D1%2C%20stop%3D15%2C%20value%3D1%2C%20step%3D1%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20label%3D%22Degr%C3%A9%20du%20polyn%C3%B4me%22%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20show_value%3DTrue%2C%0A%20%20%20%20)%0A%20%20%20%20overfit_degree_slider%0A%20%20%20%20return%20(overfit_degree_slider%2C)%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell(hide_code%3DTrue)%0Adef%20_(bleu%2C%20gris%2C%20np%2C%20overfit_degree_slider%2C%20plt%2C%20rouge)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20import%20warnings%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20Jeu%20de%20donn%C3%A9es%20synth%C3%A9tique%20%3A%20fonction%20sinus%0A%20%20%20%20_rng%20%3D%20np.random.default_rng(0)%0A%20%20%20%20_x_train%20%3D%20np.sort(_rng.uniform(0.0%2C%201.0%2C%2030))%0A%20%20%20%20_true_fn%20%3D%20lambda%20_t%3A%20np.sin(2.0%20*%20np.pi%20*%20_t)%0A%20%20%20%20_y_train%20%3D%20_true_fn(_x_train)%20%2B%20_rng.normal(0.0%2C%200.25%2C%20_x_train.size)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_degrees%20%3D%20np.arange(1%2C%2016)%0A%20%20%20%20_n_folds%20%3D%205%0A%0A%20%20%20%20def%20_polyfit_quiet(_xx%2C%20_yy%2C%20_deg)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20with%20warnings.catch_warnings()%3A%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20warnings.simplefilter(%22ignore%22%2C%20np.exceptions.RankWarning)%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20return%20np.polyfit(_xx%2C%20_yy%2C%20_deg)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20Erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20%3A%20MSE%20sur%20l'ensemble%20du%20training%20set%0A%20%20%20%20def%20_train_mse(_deg)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_coef%20%3D%20_polyfit_quiet(_x_train%2C%20_y_train%2C%20_deg)%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20return%20float(np.mean((np.polyval(_coef%2C%20_x_train)%20-%20_y_train)%20**%202))%2C%20_coef%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20Erreur%20de%20validation%20%3A%20MSE%20moyenne%20par%20validation%20crois%C3%A9e%20%C3%A0%205%20plis%0A%20%20%20%20def%20_val_mse(_deg)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_shuf%20%3D%20np.random.default_rng(42).permutation(_x_train.size)%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_folds%20%3D%20np.array_split(_shuf%2C%20_n_folds)%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_errs%20%3D%20%5B%5D%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20for%20_i%20in%20range(_n_folds)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_vi%20%3D%20_folds%5B_i%5D%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_ti%20%3D%20np.concatenate(%5B_folds%5B_j%5D%20for%20_j%20in%20range(_n_folds)%20if%20_j%20!%3D%20_i%5D)%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_pred%20%3D%20np.polyval(_polyfit_quiet(_x_train%5B_ti%5D%2C%20_y_train%5B_ti%5D%2C%20_deg)%2C%20_x_train%5B_vi%5D)%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20_errs.append(np.mean((_pred%20-%20_y_train%5B_vi%5D)%20**%202))%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20return%20float(np.mean(_errs))%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_train_curve%20%3D%20np.array(%5B_train_mse(_d)%5B0%5D%20for%20_d%20in%20_degrees%5D)%0A%20%20%20%20_val_curve%20%3D%20np.array(%5B_val_mse(_d)%20for%20_d%20in%20_degrees%5D)%0A%20%20%20%20_best_deg%20%3D%20int(_degrees%5Bnp.argmin(_val_curve)%5D)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20Degr%C3%A9%20s%C3%A9lectionn%C3%A9%20via%20slider%20%0A%20%20%20%20_d%20%3D%20int(overfit_degree_slider.value)%0A%20%20%20%20_cur_train%2C%20_cur_coef%20%3D%20_train_mse(_d)%0A%20%20%20%20_cur_val%20%3D%20_val_curve%5B_d%20-%201%5D%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20Figure%20%3A%20ajustement%20gauche%2Fdroite%0A%20%20%20%20_fig%2C%20(_axL%2C%20_axR)%20%3D%20plt.subplots(1%2C%202%2C%20figsize%3D(12%2C%204.6))%0A%20%20%20%20_grid%20%3D%20np.linspace(0%2C%201%2C%20400)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_axL.scatter(_x_train%2C%20_y_train%2C%20s%3D34%2C%20color%3D%22%232b6cb0%22%2C%20zorder%3D3%2C%20label%3D%22Donn%C3%A9es%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axL.plot(_grid%2C%20_true_fn(_grid)%2C%20%22--%22%2C%20color%3D%22%23718096%22%2C%20lw%3D1.8%2C%20label%3D%22Fonction%20r%C3%A9elle%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axL.plot(_grid%2C%20np.clip(np.polyval(_cur_coef%2C%20_grid)%2C%20-3%2C%203)%2C%20color%3D%22%23dd6b20%22%2C%20lw%3D2.2%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20label%3Df%22Mod%C3%A8le%20ajust%C3%A9%20(degr%C3%A9%20%7B_d%7D)%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axL.set_ylim(-2.2%2C%202.2)%0A%20%20%20%20_axL.set_xlabel(%22x%22)%3B%20_axL.set_ylabel(%22y%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axL.set_title(f%22Ajustement%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20%E2%80%94%20degr%C3%A9%20%7B_d%7D%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axL.legend(loc%3D%22upper%20right%22%2C%20fontsize%3D8.5%2C%20framealpha%3D0.9)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.semilogy(_degrees%2C%20_train_curve%2C%20%22o-%22%2C%20color%3D%22%232b6cb0%22%2C%20lw%3D1.8%2C%20ms%3D5%2C%20label%3D%22Erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.semilogy(_degrees%2C%20_val_curve%2C%20%22s-%22%2C%20color%3D%22%23c53030%22%2C%20lw%3D1.8%2C%20ms%3D5%2C%20label%3D%22Erreur%20de%20validation%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.axvline(_best_deg%2C%20color%3D%22%2338a169%22%2C%20ls%3D%22--%22%2C%20lw%3D1.4%2C%20alpha%3D0.8)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.text(_best_deg%20%2B%200.2%2C%20_val_curve.min()%20*%201.7%2C%20%22meilleur%5Cncompromis%22%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20color%3D%22%2338a169%22%2C%20fontsize%3D8%2C%20va%3D%22bottom%22%2C%20ha%3D%22left%22)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20%C3%89cart%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20au%20degr%C3%A9%20courant%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.plot(%5B_d%2C%20_d%5D%2C%20%5B_cur_train%2C%20_cur_val%5D%2C%20color%3Dgris%2C%20lw%3D6%2C%20alpha%3D0.55%2C%20solid_capstyle%3D%22round%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.scatter(%5B_d%2C%20_d%5D%2C%20%5B_cur_train%2C%20_cur_val%5D%2C%20color%3D%5Bbleu%2C%20rouge%5D%2C%20s%3D70%2C%20zorder%3D5%2C%20ec%3D%22white%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.set_xlabel(%22Degr%C3%A9%20du%20polyn%C3%B4me%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.set_ylabel(%22MSE%20(%C3%A9chelle%20log)%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.set_title(f%22%C3%89cart%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20au%20degr%C3%A9%20%7B_d%7D%20%3A%20%7B_cur_val%20-%20_cur_train%3A.3f%7D%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.set_xticks(_degrees)%0A%20%20%20%20_axR.legend(loc%3D%22upper%20left%22%2C%20fontsize%3D8.5)%0A%20%20%20%20_fig.tight_layout()%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_fig%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell(hide_code%3DTrue)%0Adef%20_(mo)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20mo.md(r%22%22%22%0A%20%20%20%20Deux%20crit%C3%A8res%20permettent%20de%20d%C3%A9terminer%20le%20meilleur%20compromis%20%3A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20L'%C3%A9cart%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%0A%20%20%20%20-%20La%20moyenne%20des%20erreurs%0A%0A%20%20%20%20En%20fixant%20un%20degr%C3%A9%20de%201%20ou%20de%202%2C%20notre%20mod%C3%A8le%20ne%20r%C3%A9alise%20ni%20sur-apprentissage%20ni%20sous-apprentissage%2C%20mais%20ses%20pr%C3%A9dictions%20sont%20comparativement%20assez%20**mauvaises**.%20On%20consid%C3%A8re%20donc%20ici%20que%20la%20r%C3%A9gression%20polynomiale%20de%20degr%C3%A9%203%20est%20la%20meilleure%2C%20bien%20que%20son%20%C3%A9cart%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20ne%20soit%20pas%20le%20plus%20petit%20de%20tous.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Impl%C3%A9mentation%0A%0A%20%20%20%20La%20fa%C3%A7on%20la%20plus%20concise%20de%20calculer%20ces%20erreurs%20en%20g%C3%A9rant%20les%20deux%20types%20d'entra%C3%AEnements%20consiste%20%C3%A0%20utiliser%20%60cross_validate%60.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20L'impl%C3%A9mentation%20suivante%20mobilise%20le%20jeu%20de%20donn%C3%A9es%20et%20la%20pipeline%20pr%C3%A9c%C3%A9demment%20cr%C3%A9%C3%A9s.%0A%20%20%20%20%22%22%22)%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell%0Adef%20_(X_polreg_raw%2C%20np%2C%20poly_reg%2C%20y_polreg)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20from%20sklearn.model_selection%20import%20cross_validate%0A%0A%20%20%20%20res%20%3D%20cross_validate(poly_reg%2C%20X_polreg_raw%2C%20y_polreg%2C%20cv%3D5%2C%20scoring%3D%22neg_root_mean_squared_error%22%2C%20return_train_score%3DTrue)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20tab_mse_train_error%20%3D%20-res%5B%22train_score%22%5D%0A%20%20%20%20tab_mse_validation_error%20%3D%20-res%5B%22test_score%22%5D%0A%0A%20%20%20%20print(f%22Erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20%3A%20%7Bnp.mean(tab_mse_train_error)%3A.3f%7D%5CnErreur%20de%20validation%20%3A%20%7Bnp.mean(tab_mse_validation_error)%3A.3f%7D%20%22)%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell(hide_code%3DTrue)%0Adef%20_(mo)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20mo.md(r%22%22%22%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Formalisation%20math%C3%A9matique%20des%20erreurs%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Pour%20mieux%20comprendre%20la%20structure%20math%C3%A9matique%20des%20notions%20pr%C3%A9sent%C3%A9es%20dans%20la%20section%20suivante%2C%20les%20_learning%20curves_%2C%20il%20peut%20%C3%AAtre%20utile%20de%20formaliser%20les%20concepts%20que%20l'on%20a%20vus%20jusqu'ici.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%20details%20%7C%20Formalisation%20math%C3%A9matique%20des%20erreurs%20-%20(pour%20aller%20plus%20loin)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Reprenons%20le%20cadre%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ration%20utilis%C3%A9%20depuis%20le%20d%C3%A9but%20du%20chapitre%20%3A%20le%20label%20s'%C3%A9crit%20comme%20une%20fonction%20**d%C3%A9terministe**%20des%20pr%C3%A9dicteurs%2C%20corrompue%20par%20un%20bruit%20additif.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24y%20%3D%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D)%20%2B%20%5Cepsilon%2C%20%5Cqquad%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Cepsilon%5D%20%3D%200%2C%20%5Cquad%20%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D(%5Cepsilon)%20%3D%20%5Csigma%5E2%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20La%20fonction%20%24f%24%20est%20la%20**structure%20sous-jacente**%20que%20l'on%20cherche%20%C3%A0%20approcher%20(la%20_fonction%20r%C3%A9elle_%20qui%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A8re%20les%20distributions%20de%20points)%20%3B%20%24%5Cepsilon%24%20est%20un%20bruit%20al%C3%A9atoire%20de%20moyenne%20nulle.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20L'entra%C3%AEnement%2C%20lui%2C%20produit%20un%20mod%C3%A8le%20%C3%A0%20partir%20d'un%20training%20set.%20Mais%20ce%20jeu%20n'est%20qu'un%20**tirage**%20parmi%20tous%20les%20training%20sets%20possibles%20%3A%20avec%20d'autres%20donn%C3%A9es%2C%20on%20aurait%20obtenu%20d'autres%20param%C3%A8tres%20%24%5Chat%7B%5Cboldsymbol%7B%5Ctheta%7D%7D%24%2C%20donc%20un%20autre%20mod%C3%A8le.%20Par%20cons%C3%A9quent%20la**%20fonction%20hypoth%C3%A8se**%20apprise%20est%20**al%C3%A9atoire**%20%3B%20pour%20all%C3%A9ger%2C%20on%20note%20%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%24%20sa%20pr%C3%A9diction%20en%20une%20instance%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0%24%20fix%C3%A9e%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%20%3A%3D%20h_%7B%5Chat%7B%5Cboldsymbol%7B%5Ctheta%7D%7D%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%3E%20Puisque%20%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D%24%20est%20fonction%20de%20plusieurs%20variables%20(le%20training%20set%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%2C%20l'instance%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0%24%20en%20laquelle%20est%20elle%20%C3%A9valu%C3%A9e%2C%20etc.)%2C%20on%20notera%20en%20indice%20la%20grandeur%20sur%20laquelle%20on%20moyenne%20dans%20l'expression%20de%20l'esp%C3%A9rance.%20Par%20exemple%2C%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B%5Chat%7Bf%7D%5Cbig%5D%24%20est%20la%20fonction%20moyenne%20obtenue%20%C3%A0%20partir%20de%20tous%20les%20training%20sets%20possibles.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%23%20Erreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Pour%20un%20mod%C3%A8le%20donn%C3%A9%20d%C3%A9j%C3%A0%20entra%C3%AEn%C3%A9%2C%20on%20d%C3%A9finit%20l'**erreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation**%20comme%20la%20moyenne%20des%20%C3%A9carts%20au%20carr%C3%A9s%20entre%20%24y%24%20et%20%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D%24%20sur%20l'ensemble%20des%20instances%20de%20l'univers%20(sauf%20celles%20utilis%C3%A9es%20pendant%20l'entra%C3%AEnement).%20Elle%20quantifie%20l'exacte%20capacit%C3%A9%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20(d'o%C3%B9%20son%20nom).%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24R(%5Chat%20f)%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%2Cy)%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20C'est%20un%20id%C3%A9al%20th%C3%A9orique%2C%20il%20faudrait%20toute%20la%20distribution%20pour%20la%20calculer.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%23%20Erreur%20de%20validation%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Cette%20erreur%20est%20simplement%20l'estimateur%20empirique%20de%20%24R(%5Chat%20f)%24%20sur%20un%20%C3%A9chantillon%20%24V%24%20de%20%24p%24%20instances%20in%C3%A9dites%20(i.e.%20issues%20du%20test%20set).%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_V(%5Chat%20f)%7D_1%20%3D%20%5Cfrac%7B1%7D%7Bp%7D%5Csum_%7Bj%3D1%7D%5E%7Bp%7D%5Cbig(y%5E%7B(j)%7D%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(j)%7D)%5Cbig)%5E2%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20NB%20%3A%20On%20peut%20prouver%20facilement%20que%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7BV%7D%20%5Cbig%5B%5Cwidehat%20R_V(%5Chat%20f)-%20R(%5Chat%20f)%5Cbig%5D%3D0%24%20c'est-%C3%A0-dire%20que%20cet%20estimateur%20est%20**sans%20biais**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Rigoureusement%2C%20cette%20mesure%20correspond%20%C3%A0%20la%20RMSE%20que%20l'on%20calcule%20sur%20le%20test%20set%20une%20fois%20notre%20mod%C3%A8le%20d%C3%A9finitivement%20fix%C3%A9.%20Pour%20avoir%20une%20id%C3%A9e%20de%20la%20capacit%C3%A9%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20sans%20induire%20un%20_data%20snooping%20bias_%2C%20on%20l'approche%20par%20validation%20crois%C3%A9e%20avec%20%60cross_validate%60%20en%20faisant%20la%20moyenne%20des%20erreurs%20sur%20les%20diff%C3%A9rents%20folds.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%23%20Erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%0A%0A%20%20%20%20L'erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20%24%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_V(%5Chat%20f)%7D_2%24%20est%20un%20estimateur%20**biais%C3%A9**%20de%20%24R(%5Chat%20f)%24.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_V(%5Chat%20f)%7D_2%20%3D%20%5Cfrac%7B1%7D%7Bp%7D%5Csum_%7Bj%3D1%7D%5E%7Bp%7D%5Cbig(y%5E%7B(j)%7D%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(j)%7D)%5Cbig)%5E2%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Il%20ressemble%20%C3%A0%20l'erreur%20de%20validation%2C%20mais%20son%20estimation%20est%20r%C3%A9alis%C3%A9e%20sur%20un%20%C3%A9chantillon%20%24V'%24%20d'instances%20**non%20in%C3%A9dites**%2C%20issues%20du%20train%20set.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%23%20%C3%89cart%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%0A%0A%20%20%20%20C'est%20la%20diff%C3%A9rence%20entre%20l'erreur%20de%20validation%20et%20l'erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement.%20Son%20nom%20est%20trompeur%2C%20attention%20%C3%A0%20ne%20pas%20le%20confondre%20avec%20l'_erreur_%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%0A%0A%20%20%20%20---%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%20E.%20Learning%20curves%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Si%20l'%C3%A9cart%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20constitue%20d%C3%A9j%C3%A0%20un%20bon%20indicateur%2C%20il%20peut%20%C3%AAtre%20plus%20instructif%20d'%C3%A9tudier%2C%20pour%20un%20mod%C3%A8le%20donn%C3%A9%2C%20son%20%C3%A9volution%20au%20cours%20de%20son%20entra%C3%AEnement.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Concr%C3%A8tement%2C%20il%20s'agit%20de%20mesurer%20l'erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20et%20l'erreur%20de%20validation%20%C3%A0%20chaque%20it%C3%A9ration%20de%20%60partial_fit()%60%2C%20puis%20de%20tracer%20cette%20%C3%A9volution.%20Les%20deux%20courbes%20que%20l'on%20obtient%20sont%20appel%C3%A9es%20**learning%20curves**%20(courbes%20d'entra%C3%AEnement).%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%3E%20Si%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20ne%20supporte%20pas%20l'apprentissage%20incr%C3%A9m%C3%A9ntal%20-%20i.e.%20ne%20dispose%20pas%20nativement%20de%20la%20m%C3%A9thode%20%60partial_fit()%60%20-%20%2C%20il%20suffit%20de%20le%20r%C3%A9-entra%C3%AEner%20compl%C3%A8tement%20sur%20des%20sous-ensemble%20du%20training%20set%20de%20tailles%20croissantes.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Impl%C3%A9mentation%20Scikit%20%3Ca%20id%3D%22implementation-scikit%22%3E%3C%2Fa%3E%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Scikit-Learn%20facilite%20l'impl%C3%A9mentation%20avec%20%60learning_curve()%60%20%3A%20la%20fonction%20it%C3%A8re%20sur%20diff%C3%A9rentes%20tailles%20de%20training%20set%2C%20et%20renvoie%20trois%20tableaux%20dont%20les%20%C3%A9l%C3%A9ments%20correspondent%20chacun%20%C3%A0%20une%20it%C3%A9ration.%0A%20%20%20%201.%20%60train_sizes_abs%60%20%3A%20les%20tailles%20successives%20des%20training%20subsets%0A%20%20%20%202.%20%60train_scores%60%20%3A%20l'erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20sur%20le%20subset%20courant%0A%20%20%20%203.%20%60test_scores%60%20%3A%20les%20%24k%24%20erreurs%20de%20validation%20sur%20les%20%24k%24%20splits%20du%20subset%20courant%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%3E%20L'option%20%60exploit_incremental_learning%3DTrue%60%20permet%20d'entra%C3%AEner%20les%20mod%C3%A8les%20incr%C3%A9mentalement.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20reprend%20nos%20donn%C3%A9es%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9r%C3%A9es%20avec%20une%20%C3%A9quation%20quadratique%2C%20on%20entra%C3%AEne%20deux%20mod%C3%A8les%20(une%20r%C3%A9gression%20lin%C3%A9aire%2C%20une%20r%C3%A9gression%20polynomiale%20de%20degr%C3%A9%2010)%20et%20on%20trace%20les%20learnings%20curves%20associ%C3%A9es.%20On%20s'attend%20%C3%A0%20observer%20pour%20les%20deux%20sch%C3%A9mas%2C%20respectivement%20de%20l'underfitting%20et%20de%20l'overfitting.%0A%20%20%20%20%22%22%22)%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell%0Adef%20_(%0A%20%20%20%20LinearRegression%2C%0A%20%20%20%20PolynomialFeatures%2C%0A%20%20%20%20X_polreg_raw%2C%0A%20%20%20%20make_pipeline%2C%0A%20%20%20%20np%2C%0A%20%20%20%20y_polreg%2C%0A)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20from%20sklearn.model_selection%20import%20learning_curve%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20R%C3%A9gression%20polynomiale%20de%20degr%C3%A9%201%20(droite%20affine)%0A%20%20%20%20uf_polynomial_regression%20%3D%20make_pipeline(PolynomialFeatures(degree%3D1%2C%20include_bias%3DFalse)%2C%20LinearRegression())%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%20R%C3%A9gression%20polynomiale%20de%20degr%C3%A9%2010%20%0A%20%20%20%20of_polynomial_regression%20%3D%20make_pipeline(PolynomialFeatures(degree%3D10%2C%20include_bias%3DFalse)%2C%20LinearRegression())%0A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20uf_train_sizes%2C%20uf_train_scores%2C%20uf_valid_scores%20%3D%20learning_curve(%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20uf_polynomial_regression%2C%20X_polreg_raw%2C%20y_polreg%2C%20train_sizes%3Dnp.linspace(0.01%2C%201.0%2C%2040)%2C%20cv%3D5%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20scoring%3D%22neg_root_mean_squared_error%22)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20of_train_sizes%2C%20of_train_scores%2C%20of_valid_scores%20%3D%20learning_curve(%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20of_polynomial_regression%2C%20X_polreg_raw%2C%20y_polreg%2C%20train_sizes%3Dnp.linspace(0.01%2C%201.0%2C%2040)%2C%20cv%3D5%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20scoring%3D%22neg_root_mean_squared_error%22)%0A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20uf_train_errors%20%3D%20-uf_train_scores.mean(axis%3D1)%0A%20%20%20%20uf_valid_errors%20%3D%20-uf_valid_scores.mean(axis%3D1)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20of_train_errors%20%3D%20-of_train_scores.mean(axis%3D1)%0A%20%20%20%20of_valid_errors%20%3D%20-of_valid_scores.mean(axis%3D1)%0A%20%20%20%20return%20(%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20of_train_errors%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20of_train_sizes%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20of_valid_errors%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20uf_train_errors%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20uf_train_sizes%2C%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20%20%20uf_valid_errors%2C%0A%20%20%20%20)%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell(hide_code%3DTrue)%0Adef%20_(%0A%20%20%20%20bleu%2C%0A%20%20%20%20of_train_errors%2C%0A%20%20%20%20of_train_sizes%2C%0A%20%20%20%20of_valid_errors%2C%0A%20%20%20%20plt%2C%0A%20%20%20%20rouge%2C%0A%20%20%20%20uf_train_errors%2C%0A%20%20%20%20uf_train_sizes%2C%0A%20%20%20%20uf_valid_errors%2C%0A)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20_%2C%20_axes%20%3D%20plt.subplots(1%2C%202%2C%20figsize%3D(10%2C%204)%2C%20sharey%3DTrue)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.plot(uf_train_sizes%2C%20uf_train_errors%2C%20%22-%2B%22%2C%20color%3Drouge%2C%20linewidth%3D2%2C%20label%3D%22entra%C3%AEnement%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.plot(uf_train_sizes%2C%20uf_valid_errors%2C%20%22-%22%2C%20color%3Dbleu%2C%20linewidth%3D3%2C%20label%3D%22validation%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.legend(loc%3D%22upper%20right%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.set_xlabel(%22Taille%20du%20training%20set%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.set_ylabel(%22RMSE%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.grid()%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.axis(%5B0%2C%20160%2C%200%2C%202.5%5D)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B0%5D.set_title(%22Learning%20curve%20%3A%20plot%20n%C2%B01%22)%20%23%20Tu%20peux%20changer%20ce%20titre%0A%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B1%5D.plot(of_train_sizes%2C%20of_train_errors%2C%20%22-%2B%22%2C%20color%3Drouge%2C%20linewidth%3D2%2C%20label%3D%22entra%C3%AEnement%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B1%5D.plot(of_train_sizes%2C%20of_valid_errors%2C%20%22-%22%2C%20color%3Dbleu%2C%20linewidth%3D3%2C%20label%3D%22validation%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B1%5D.legend(loc%3D%22upper%20right%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B1%5D.set_xlabel(%22Taille%20du%20training%20set%22)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B1%5D.grid()%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B1%5D.axis(%5B0%2C%20160%2C%200%2C%202.5%5D)%0A%20%20%20%20_axes%5B1%5D.set_title(%22Learning%20curve%20%3A%20plot%20n%C2%B02%22)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20plt.tight_layout()%0A%20%20%20%20plt.show()%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0A%40app.cell(hide_code%3DTrue)%0Adef%20_(mo)%3A%0A%20%20%20%20mo.md(r%22%22%22%0A%20%20%20%20Apr%C3%A8s%20avoir%20introduit%20quelques%20notions%20utiles%2C%20la%20section%20%5BInterpr%C3%A9ter%20les%20learning%20curves%5D(%23interpreter-learning-curve)%20pr%C3%A9sente%20des%20crit%C3%A8res%20pratiques%20pour%20analyser%20ces%20courbes.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20---%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%20F.%20La%20d%C3%A9composition%20biais-variance-erreur%20irr%C3%A9ductible%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Un%20examen%20approfondi%20de%20l'erreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20peut%20nous%20permettre%20de%20mieux%20comprendre%20ce%20qui%20affecte%20la%20capacit%C3%A9%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20du%20mod%C3%A8le.%20En%20l'esp%C3%A8ce%2C%20on%20se%20propose%20de%20montrer%20que%20cette%20erreur%20est%20la%20somme%20d'un%20terme%20de%20**biais**%2C%20d'un%20terme%20de%20**variance**%20et%20d'une%20**erreur%20irr%C3%A9ductible**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%20details%20%7C%20La%20d%C3%A9composition%20biais-variance-erreur%20irr%C3%A9ductible%20(pour%20aller%20plus%20loin)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20rappelle%20que%20la%20variable%20cible%20s'%C3%A9crit%20comme%20une%20fonction%20%24f%24%20des%20pr%C3%A9dicteurs%2C%20que%20notre%20mod%C3%A8le%20va%20tenter%20d'approcher%20par%20une%20fonction%20%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D%24.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24y%20%3D%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D)%20%2B%20%5Cepsilon%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Lors%20de%20l'entra%C3%AEnement%2C%20on%20produit%20un%20mod%C3%A8le%20%C3%A0%20partir%20d'un%20training%20set.%20Si%20on%20consid%C3%A8re%20les%20choix%20de%20mod%C3%A9lisation%20**fix%C3%A9s**%2C%20la%20fonction%20%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D%24%20apprise%20est%20enti%C3%A8rement%20d%C3%A9termin%C3%A9e%20par%20le%20jeu%20d'entra%C3%AEnement.%20Et%20puisque%20ce%20jeu%20n'est%20qu'un%20**tirage**%20parmi%20tous%20les%20training%20sets%20possibles%2C%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20est%20lui-m%C3%AAme%20le%20fruit%20d'un%20tirage%2C%20dont%20on%20peut%20%C3%A9tudier%20les%20**propri%C3%A9t%C3%A9s%20statistiques**%20%3A%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B%5Chat%7Bf%7D%20%5Cbig%5D%24%2C%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B%5Chat%7Bf%7D%20%5Cbig%5D%24%2C%20etc..%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Formellement%2C%20on%20note%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Chat%20f%20%3D%20%5Cmathcal%7BA%7D(%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D)%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20o%C3%B9%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BA%7D%24%20est%20l'**algorithme%20d'apprentissage**%2C%20qui%20empaquette%20tous%20les%20choix%20de%20mod%C3%A9lisation%20%3A%20la%20classe%20d'hypoth%C3%A8ses%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BH%7D%24%20(lin%C3%A9aire%20%3F%20polynomiale%20de%20degr%C3%A9%20%24d%24%20%3F%20SVM%20%3F)%2C%20la%20standardisation%2C%20la%20fonction%20de%20co%C3%BBt%2C%20la%20r%C3%A9gularisation%2C%20etc..%0A%0A%20%20%20%20L'erreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20%24R(%5Chat%20f)%24%20quantifiant%20l'exacte%20capacit%C3%A9%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20**pour%20un%20training%20set%20donn%C3%A9**%2C%20on%20va%20%C3%A9tudier%20son%20esp%C3%A9rance%20pour%20tous%20les%20tirages%20possibles.%20Cela%20revient%20%C3%A0%20%C3%A9tudier%20%24R(%5Cmathcal%7BA%7D)%24%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5BR(%5Chat%20f)%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5C%2C%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%2C%20y)%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%20%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%3Ca%20id%3D%22etape-demo%22%3E%3C%2Fa%3E%20Soit%20%24%5Cmathcal%20P%24%20la%20distribution%20du%20test%20set%2C%20tirer%20%24(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%2Cy)%5Csim%5Cmathcal%20P%24%20revient%20%C3%A0%20tirer%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0%20%5Csim%20%5Cmathcal%20P_%7B%5Cmathbf%20x%7D%24%20et%20%24%5Cepsilon%20%5Csim%20%5Cmathcal%20P_%7B%5Cmathbf%20%5Cepsilon%7D%24%20et%20%C3%A0%20fixer%20ensuite%20%24y%20%3D%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%2B%5Cepsilon%24.%20D'autre%20part%2C%20l'int%C3%A9grande%20%C3%A9tant%20positive%20on%20peut%20permuter%20les%20esp%C3%A9rances%20en%20vertu%20du%20th%C3%A9or%C3%A8me%20de%20Fubini%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5C%2C%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%2C%20y)%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Berreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%2C%20moyenn%C3%A9e%20sur%20%7D%20%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathbf%7Bx_0%7D%7D%5CBig%5B%5C%2C%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bobjet%20de%20la%20d%C3%A9monstration%7D%7D%5C%2C%5CBig%5D%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Ainsi%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%24%20mesure%20l'erreur%20quadratique%20en%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0%24%2C%20moyenn%C3%A9e%20%C3%A0%20la%20fois%20sur%20le%20bruit%20%24%5Cepsilon%24%20de%20l'instance%20test%20et%20sur%20le%20tirage%20du%20training%20set.%20En%20notant%20%24%5Cbar%7Bf%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%7Bf%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%5D%24%20la%20pr%C3%A9diction%20du%20**mod%C3%A8le%20moyen**%20(celui%20qu'on%20obtiendrait%20en%20moyennant%20une%20infinit%C3%A9%20de%20mod%C3%A8les%20entra%C3%AEn%C3%A9s)%2C%20cette%20erreur%20se%20d%C3%A9compose%20en%20**trois%20termes**%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cbig(f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%20-%20%5Cbar%7Bf%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%5Cbig)%5E2%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bbiais%7D%5E2%7D%20%5C%3B%2B%5C%3B%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5C!%5Cleft%5B%5Cbig(%5Chat%7Bf%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%20-%20%5Cbar%7Bf%7D(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%5Cbig)%5E2%5Cright%5D%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bvariance%7D%7D%20%5C%3B%2B%5C%3B%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Csigma%5E2%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Berreur%20irr%C3%A9ductible%7D%7D%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%20details%20%7C%20D%C3%A9composition%20biais-variance%20-%20d%C3%A9monstration%20(pour%20aller%20_encore_%20loin)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20**%C3%89tape%200%20-%20contexte%20et%20notations**%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20suppose%20que%20le%20bruit%20%24%5Cepsilon%24%20de%20l'instance%20test%20est%20%3A%0A%20%20%20%201.%20**ind%C3%A9pendant**%20du%20training%20set%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%0A%20%20%20%202.%20**centr%C3%A9**%20(%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Cepsilon%5D%3D0%24)%0A%20%20%20%203.%20de%20variance%20%24%5Csigma%5E2%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D(%5Cepsilon)%24.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Pour%20all%C3%A9ger%2C%20on%20omet%20la%20d%C3%A9pendance%20en%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0%24%20et%20on%20note%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24f%20%3D%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%2C%20%5Cquad%20%5Chat%20f%20%3D%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%2C%20%5Cquad%20%5Cbar%20f%20%3D%20%5Cbar%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5B%5Chat%20f%5D%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20rappelle%20que%20%24y%20%3D%20f%20%2B%20%5Cepsilon%24%20et%20que%20notre%20objectif%20est%20de%20d%C3%A9composer%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%5Cbig%5D%24.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20**%C3%89tape%201%20%E2%80%94%20isoler%20le%20bruit.**%20En%20%C3%A9crivant%20%24y%20-%20%5Chat%20f%20%3D%20(f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%20%2B%20%5Cepsilon%24%20et%20en%20d%C3%A9veloppant%20le%20carr%C3%A9%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%20%3D%20(f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%20%2B%202%5C%2C%5Cepsilon%5C%2C(f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%20%2B%20%5Cepsilon%5E2%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20prend%20l'esp%C3%A9rance%20sur%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%20et%20%24%5Cepsilon%24.%20Le%20terme%20crois%C3%A9%20se%20**factorise**%20car%20%24%5Cepsilon%20%5Cperp%20%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%2C%20puis%20**s'annule**%20car%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Cepsilon%5D%3D0%24%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5Cepsilon%7D%5Cbig%5B2%5C%2C%5Cepsilon%5C%2C(f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%202%5C%2C%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Cepsilon%5D%7D_%7B%3D%5C%2C0%7D%5C%3B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5Bf%20-%20%5Chat%20f%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%200%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20La%20quantit%C3%A9%20%24f%20-%20%5Chat%20f%24%20ne%20d%C3%A9pendant%20que%20de%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%2C%20et%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%5Cepsilon%5B%5Cepsilon%5E2%5D%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D(%5Cepsilon)%20%3D%20%5Csigma%5E2%24%20(le%20bruit%20est%20centr%C3%A9)%2C%20il%20reste%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5Cepsilon%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B(f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%5Cbig%5D%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Berreur%20d'estimation%7D%7D%20%2B%20%5C%3B%5Csigma%5E2%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20**%C3%89tape%202%20%E2%80%94%20faire%20appara%C3%AEtre%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20moyen.**%20On%20introduit%20%24%5Cbar%20f%24%20dans%20le%20premier%20terme%20via%20%24f%20-%20%5Chat%20f%20%3D%20(f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)%20%2B%20(%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%24%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24(f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%20%3D%20(f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)%5E2%20%2B%202%5C%2C(f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)(%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%20%2B%20(%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20prend%20l'esp%C3%A9rance%20sur%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24.%20De%20nouveau%20le%20terme%20crois%C3%A9%20s'annule%20%3A%20%24f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f%24%20est%20une%20constante%20ind%C3%A9pendante%20de%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%20(%24f%24%20est%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20th%C3%A9orique%20et%20%24%5Cbar%20f%24%20est%20d%C3%A9j%C3%A0%20moyenn%C3%A9%20sur%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24)%2C%20et%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5B%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Chat%20f%5D%20%3D%20%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5B%5Chat%20f%5D%20%3D%20%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f%20%3D%200%24%20par%20**d%C3%A9finition**%20de%20%24%5Cbar%20f%24%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B2%5C%2C(f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)(%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%202%5C%2C(f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)%5C%2C%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B%5Cbar%20f%20-%20%5Chat%20f%5Cbig%5D%7D_%7B%3D%5C%2C0%7D%20%3D%200%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Il%20vient%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B(f%20-%20%5Chat%20f)%5E2%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%20%5Cunderbrace%7B(f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)%5E2%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bbiais%7D%5E2%7D%20%2B%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B(%5Chat%20f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)%5E2%5Cbig%5D%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bvariance%7D%7D%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20reconna%C3%AEt%20la%20formule%20de%20la%20variance%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig(%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%5Cbig)%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B(%5Chat%20f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)%5E2%5Cbig%5D%24%2C%20puisque%20%24%5Cbar%20f%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5B%5Chat%20f%5D%24.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20**Conclusion.**%20En%20r%C3%A9injectant%20ce%20r%C3%A9sultat%20dans%20celui%20de%20l'%C3%A9tape%201%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cbig(f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%20-%20%5Cbar%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%5Cbig)%5E2%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bbiais%7D%5E2%7D%20%2B%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B(%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0)%20-%20%5Cbar%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bvariance%7D%7D%20%2B%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Csigma%5E2%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Berreur%20irr%C3%A9ductible%7D%7D%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Par%20lin%C3%A9arit%C3%A9%20de%20l'esp%C3%A9rance%2C%20c'est%20l'erreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20elle-m%C3%AAme%20qui%20se%20d%C3%A9compose%20en%20**trois%20contributions**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Analyse%20des%203%20constributions%0A%0A%20%20%20%201.%20L'**erreur%20irr%C3%A9ductible**%20%24%5Csigma%5E2%3D%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D(%5Cepsilon)%24%20porte%20bien%20son%20nom%20%3A%20elle%20ne%20d%C3%A9pend%20ni%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20ni%20du%20training%20set%2C%20donc%20m%C3%AAme%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20parfait%20%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D%20%3D%20f%24%20la%20subirait%2C%20puisqu'aucun%20apprentissage%20ne%20peut%20deviner%20le%20bruit%20%24%5Cepsilon%24.%0A%20%20%20%202.%20Le%20**biais**%20%24%5Cbig(f%20-%20%5Cbar%7Bf%7D%5Cbig)%5E2%24%20mesure%20l'%C3%A9cart%20entre%20la%20structure%20r%C3%A9elle%20%24f%24%20et%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20moyen%20%24%5Cbar%7Bf%7D%24.%20Il%20est%20%C3%A9lev%C3%A9%20quand%20la%20famille%20de%20mod%C3%A8les%20est%20**trop%20rigide**%20pour%20%C3%A9pouser%20%24f%24.%20C'est%20la%20signature%20de%20l'**underfitting**.%0A%20%20%20%203.%20La%20**variance**%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D(%5Chat%7Bf%7D)%24%20mesure%20la%20sensibilit%C3%A9%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20au%20training%20set%20%3A%20de%20combien%20%24%5Chat%7Bf%7D%24%20fluctue-t-il%20lorsqu'on%20change%20les%20donn%C3%A9es%20%3F%20Elle%20est%20%C3%A9lev%C3%A9e%20quand%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20est%20**trop%20flexible**%20et%20%C3%A9pouse%20le%20bruit%20propre%20%C3%A0%20chaque%20jeu.%20C'est%20la%20signature%20de%20l'**overfitting**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20C'est%20ce%20vocabulaire%2C%20**biais%20%C3%A9lev%C3%A9**%20pour%20l'underfitting%2C%20**variance%20%C3%A9lev%C3%A9e**%20pour%20l'overfitting%2C%20que%20l'on%20mobilise%20pour%20lire%20les%20learning%20curves%20dans%20la%20section%20suivante.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Le%20compromis%20biais-variance%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20parle%20souvent%20de%20compromis%20biais-variance%20(il%20y%20a%20m%C3%AAme%20une%20%5Bpage%20Wikip%C3%A9dia%5D(https%3A%2F%2Ffr.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2FDilemme_biais-variance)%20d%C3%A9di%C3%A9e)%2C%20mais%20m%C3%AAme%20en%20%C3%A9tudiant%20la%20d%C3%A9monstration%20pr%C3%A9c%C3%A9dente%20et%20l'expression%20des%20trois%20contributions%2C%20il%20n'est%20pas%20trivial%20d'%C3%A9tablir%20l'**antagonisme**%20entre%20ces%20termes.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20En%20fait%2C%20on%20peut%20d%C3%A9montrer%20que%20si%20l'on%20%C3%A9value%20ces%20deux%20composantes%20le%20long%20d'une%20famille%20de%20complexit%C3%A9%20croissante%2C%20**leurs%20d%C3%A9riv%C3%A9es%20par%20rapport%20%C3%A0%20la%20complexit%C3%A9%20sont%20de%20signes%20oppos%C3%A9s**%20(le%20biais%20d%C3%A9cro%C3%AEt%2C%20la%20variance%20cro%C3%AEt).%20Cet%20antagonisme%20n'a%20donc%20de%20sens%20que%20si%20l'on%20consid%C3%A8re%20biais%20et%20variance%20comme%20**fonctions%20de%20la%20complexit%C3%A9**%20du%20mod%C3%A8le.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20L'essentiel%20est%20de%20garder%20%C3%A0%20l'esprit%20l'intuition%20suivante%20%3A%20complexifier%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20(augmenter%20le%20degr%C3%A9%2C%20par%20exemple)%20r%C3%A9duit%20le%20biais%20mais%20gonfle%20la%20variance%2C%20et%20inversement.%20On%20ne%20peut%20annuler%20les%20deux%20simultan%C3%A9ment%2C%20et%20l'erreur%20totale%20est%20minimale%20pour%20une%20complexit%C3%A9%20**interm%C3%A9diaire**%20%3B%20exactement%20le%20_meilleur%20compromis_%20que%20rep%C3%A9rait%20plus%20haut%20%5Bla%20courbe%20d'erreur%20de%20validation%5D(%23visualisation-ecart-generalisation).%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%3E%20Tout%20ceci%20%C3%A0%20**taille%20de%20training%20set%20fix%C3%A9e**.%20Faire%20varier%20cette%20taille%2C%20c'est%20pr%C3%A9cis%C3%A9ment%20ce%20que%20tracent%20les%20learning%20curves%20%3A%20biais%20et%20variance%20%C3%A9voluent%20avec%20le%20nombre%20d'instances%2C%20ce%20qui%20explique%20le%20mouvement%20des%20deux%20courbes.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%20Interpr%C3%A9ter%20les%20learning%20curves%20%3Ca%20id%3D%22interpreter-learning-curve%22%3E%3C%2Fa%3E%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Pour%20faire%20le%20lien%20entre%20nos%203%20contributions%20et%20les%20learnings%20curves%2C%20il%20faut%20s'int%C3%A9resser%20%C3%A0%20la%20fa%C3%A7on%20dont%20ces%20termes%20se%20comportent%20au%20fur%20et%20%C3%A0%20mesure%20que%20le%20training%20set%20grossit%20(i.e.%20que%20%24m%24%20grossit)%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%201.%20**%24%5Csigma%5E2%24%20%3A%20plat.**%20Le%20bruit%20ne%20d%C3%A9pend%20ni%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20ni%20des%20donn%C3%A9es.%0A%20%20%20%202.%20**biais%20%3A%20essentiellement%20plat.**%20Il%20est%20fix%C3%A9%20par%20la%20_famille_%20de%20mod%C3%A8les%2C%20pas%20par%20la%20quantit%C3%A9%20de%20donn%C3%A9es.%20Quand%20%24m%20%5Cto%20%5Cinfty%24%2C%20le%20mod%C3%A8le%20moyen%20%24%5Cbar%20f%24%20tend%20vers%20le%20meilleur%20mod%C3%A8le%20de%20la%20classe%20%24f%5E%5Cstar%24%2C%20donc%20le%20biais%20tend%20vers%20%24f%20-%20f%5E%5Cstar%20-%20%5Ctext%7Bconstante%7D%24.%20La%20constante%20est%20%C3%A9ventuellement%20nulle%20si%20la%20classe%20peut%20repr%C3%A9senter%20%24f%24.%0A%20%20%20%203.%20**variance%20%3A%20d%C3%A9croissante%20et%20tend%20vers%20%240%24**.%20Plus%20de%20donn%C3%A9es%20%24%5CRightarrow%24%20%24%5Chat%20f%24%20se%20stabilise%20d'un%20training%20set%20%C3%A0%20l'autre%20%24%5CRightarrow%24%20les%20fluctuations%20s'%C3%A9teignent.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20En%20cons%C3%A9quence%2C%20la%20hauteur%20du%20plateau%20o%C3%B9%20se%20rejoignent%20les%20courbes%20correspond%20%C3%A0%20la%20somme%20du%20biais%20et%20du%20bruit.%20La%20variance%20s'observe%20sur%20l'%C3%A9cart%20entre%20les%20courbes.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%20details%20%7C%20Interpr%C3%A9tation%20graphique%20-%20d%C3%A9monstration%20(pour%20aller%20_vraiment_%20plus%20loin)%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20se%20propose%20de%20d%C3%A9montrer%20ici%20le%20lien%20entre%20les%20composantes%20de%20l'erreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20et%20l'interpr%C3%A9tation%20des%20learnings%20curves%20%3A%20%C2%AB%20_la%20hauteur%20du%20plateau%20o%C3%B9%20se%20rejoignent%20les%20courbes%20correspond%20%C3%A0%20la%20somme%20du%20biais%20et%20du%20bruit.%20La%20variance%20s'observe%20sur%20l'%C3%A9cart%20entre%20les%20courbes%20_%C2%BB%20.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20**Rappels%20%3A**%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20Erreur%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20%3A%20%24R(%5Chat%20f)%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%2Cy)%7D%5Cbig%5B(y%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D))%5E2%5Cbig%5D%24.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20Erreur%20de%20validation%20%3A%20%24%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_%7BV_%7B%5Ctext%7Btest%7D%7D%7D(%5Chat%20f)%7D_1%20%3D%20%5Cfrac%7B1%7D%7Bp%7D%5Csum_%7Bj%3D1%7D%5E%7Bp%7D%5Cbig(y%5E%7B(j)%7D%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(j)%7D)%5Cbig)%5E2%24%20sans%20biais%20donc%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_V%5Cbig%5B%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_%7BV_%7B%5Ctext%7Btest%7D%7D%7D(%5Chat%20f)%7D_1%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%20R(%5Chat%20f)%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20Erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20%3A%20%24%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_%7BV_%7B%5Ctext%7Btrain%7D%7D%7D(%5Chat%20f)%7D_2%20%3D%20%5Cfrac%7B1%7D%7Bp%7D%5Csum_%7Bj%3D1%7D%5E%7Bp%7D%5Cbig(y%5E%7B(j)%7D%20-%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(j)%7D)%5Cbig)%5E2%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20**Notations%20%3A**%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20On%20note%20%24%5Chat%20f_i%20%3A%3D%20%5Chat%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D)%24%20et%20%24f_i%20%3A%3D%20f(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D)%24%20%2C%20o%C3%B9%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%24%20est%20l'instance%20d'indice%20%24i%24%20du%20test%20set.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20**Objectif%20%3A**%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20On%20%C3%A9tudie%20l'esp%C3%A9rance%20des%20deux%20courbes%20sur%20le%20tirage%20du%20training%20set%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%2C%20%C3%A0%20taille%20%24m%24%20fix%C3%A9e.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%23%20Courbe%20de%20l'erreur%20de%20validation%0A%0A%20%20%20%20En%20moyennant%20sur%20%24%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24%20et%20%24V_%7B%5Ctext%7Btest%7D%7D%24%20et%20en%20r%C3%A9injectant%20la%20d%C3%A9composition%20biais-variance%20(int%C3%A9gr%C3%A9e%20sur%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0%24%2C%20comme%20on%20l'a%20fait%20%5Bici%5D(%23etape-demo))%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2CV%7D%5Cbig%5B%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_V(%5Chat%20f)%7D_1%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5BR(%5Chat%20f)%5Cbig%5D%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D_0%7D%5CBig%5B%5C%2C%5Cunderbrace%7B(f%20-%20%5Cbar%20f)%5E2%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bbiais%7D%5E2%7D%20%2B%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BV%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D(%5Chat%20f)%7D_%7B%5Ctext%7Bvariance%7D%7D%5C%2C%5CBig%5D%20%2B%20%5Csigma%5E2%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20peut%20montrer%20gr%C3%A2ce%20au%20th%C3%A9or%C3%A8me%20central%20limite%20que%20la%20matrice%20de%20covariance%20des%20param%C3%A8tres%20estim%C3%A9s%20%24%5Chat%7B%5Ctheta%7D%24%20est%20proportionnelle%20%C3%A0%20%24%5Cfrac%7B1%7D%7Bm%7D%24.%20Par%20cons%C3%A9quent%2C%20quand%20%24m%20%5Cto%20%5Cinfty%24%2C%20la%20variance%20tend%20vers%20%240%24%20%3A%20**la%20courbe%20de%20validation%20tend%20vers%20le%20plateau%20%24%5Ctext%7Bbiais%7D%5E2%20%2B%20%5Csigma%5E2%24**.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%23%20Courbe%20de%20l'erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20prend%20pour%20%24V'%24%20le%20training%20set%20lui-m%C3%AAme%20(%24p%20%3D%20m%24).%20Probl%C3%A8me%20%3A%20chaque%20%24(%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%2C%20y%5E%7B(i)%7D)%24%20a%20servi%20%C3%A0%20fabriquer%20%24%5Chat%20f%24%2C%20donc%20%24%5Chat%20f_i%24%20n'est%20plus%20ind%C3%A9pendant%20de%20%24y%5E%7B(i)%7D%24%20%3B%20le%20terme%20crois%C3%A9%20qui%20s'annulait%20%C3%A0%20l'%C3%A9tape%201%20de%20la%20d%C3%A9composition%20ne%20s'annule%20plus.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Pour%20**mesurer%20cet%20%C3%A9cart**%2C%20on%20introduit%20en%20chaque%20point%20la%20quantit%C3%A9%20%24%7By'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%20%3D%20f_i%20%2B%20%7B%5Cepsilon'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%24%2C%20de%20m%C3%AAme%20loi%20mais%20avec%20%24%7B%5Cepsilon'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%20%5Cperp%20%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%24.%20On%20appelle%20**optimisme**%20l'%C3%A9cart%20en%20esp%C3%A9rance%20entre%20l'erreur%20sur%20ces%20quantit%C3%A9s%20et%20l'erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Ctext%7Boptimisme%7D(m)%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon'%7D%5CBig%5B%5Ctfrac%7B1%7D%7Bm%7D%5Csum_%7Bi%3D1%7D%5E%7Bm%7D%20(%7By'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%20-%20%5Chat%20f_i)%5E2%5CBig%5D%20-%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B%7B%5Cwidehat%20R_V(%5Chat%20f)%7D_2%5Cbig%5D%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20En%20d%C3%A9veloppant%20les%20deux%20carr%C3%A9s%2C%20les%20termes%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%7By'%7D%5E2%5D%20%3D%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5By%5E2%5D%24%20et%20%24%5Chat%20f_i%5E2%24%20se%20compensent%20%3B%20il%20reste%2C%20en%20chaque%20point%2C%20%24-2%5C%2C%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%20f_i%5C%2C%7By'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%5D%20%2B%202%5C%2C%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%20f_i%5C%2Cy%5E%7B(i)%7D%5D%24.%20Or%20%24%7By'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%20%5Cperp%20%5Chat%20f_i%24%20donne%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%20f_i%5C%2C%7By'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%5D%20%3D%20f_i%5C%2C%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%20f_i%5D%24%2C%20tandis%20que%20%24%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%20f_i%5C%2Cy%5E%7B(i)%7D%5D%20%3D%20%5Cmathrm%7BCov%7D(%5Chat%20f_i%2C%20y%5E%7B(i)%7D)%20%2B%20f_i%5C%2C%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%20f_i%5D%24.%20Les%20termes%20en%20%24f_i%5C%2C%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D%5B%5Chat%20f_i%5D%24%20se%20t%C3%A9lescopent%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%5Ctext%7Boptimisme%7D(m)%20%3D%20%5Cfrac%7B2%7D%7Bm%7D%5Csum_%7Bi%3D1%7D%5E%7Bm%7D%20%5Cmathrm%7BCov%7D%5Cbig(%5Chat%20f_i%2C%5C%2C%20y%5E%7B(i)%7D%5Cbig)%20%5C%3B%5Cge%5C%3B%200%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Cette%20covariance%20mesure%20de%20combien%20la%20pr%C3%A9diction%20%24%5Chat%20f_i%24%20suit%20son%20propre%20label%20%3A%20c'est%20la%20signature%20de%20la%20**complexit%C3%A9**%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%2C%20qui%20alimente%20la%20variance.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20L'identit%C3%A9%20ci-dessus%20se%20r%C3%A9%C3%A9crit%2C%20le%20membre%20de%20gauche%20partageant%20**le%20m%C3%AAme%20plateau**%20que%20la%20validation%20(m%C3%AAme%20d%C3%A9composition%20biais-variance%2C%20aux%20points%20%24%5Cmathbf%7Bx%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D%24)%20%3A%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%24%24%20%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%7D%5Cbig%5B%5Cwidehat%20R_V(%5Chat%20f)_2%5Cbig%5D%20%2B%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Ctext%7Boptimisme%7D(m)%5Cvphantom%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon'%7D%5CBig%5B%5Ctfrac%7B1%7D%7Bm%7D%5Csum_%7Bi%3D1%7D%5E%7Bm%7D(%7By'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D-%5Chat%20f_i)%5E2%5CBig%5D%7D%7D_%7B%5Cxrightarrow%7B%5C%2Cm%5Cto%5Cinfty%5C%2C%7D0%7D%20%3D%20%5Cunderbrace%7B%5Cmathbb%7BE%7D_%7B%5Cmathcal%7BD%7D%2C%5C%2C%5Cepsilon'%7D%5CBig%5B%5Ctfrac%7B1%7D%7Bm%7D%5Csum_%7Bi%3D1%7D%5E%7Bm%7D(%7By'%7D%5E%7B(i)%7D-%5Chat%20f_i)%5E2%5CBig%5D%7D_%7B%5Cxrightarrow%7B%5C%2Cm%5Cto%5Cinfty%5C%2C%7D%5Ctext%7Bbiais%7D%5E2%2B%5Csigma%5E2%7D%20%24%24%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%23%23%23%23%20Conclusion%0A%0A%20%20%20%20Les%20deux%20courbes%20rejoignent%20donc%20th%C3%A9oriquement%20le%20m%C3%AAme%20plateau%20%24%5Ctext%7Bbiais%7D%5E2%20%2B%20%5Csigma%5E2%24%20(variance%20et%20optimisme%20tendent%20vers%20%240%24)%20%3A%20c'est%20**la%20hauteur%20du%20plateau%20qui%20donne%20biais%20%2B%20bruit**.%20D'autre%20part%2C%20**l'%C3%A9cart%20r%C3%A9siduel%20%C3%A0%20%24m%24%20fini%20est%20gouvern%C3%A9%20par%20la%20complexit%C3%A9%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%20(optimisme)%2C%20donc%20par%20la%20variance**.%20On%20retrouve%20exactement%20les%20deux%20r%C3%A8gles%20de%20lecture.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%2F%2F%2F%0A%0A%20%20%20%20En%20pratique%2C%20on%20se%20contente%20de%20retenir%20les%20r%C3%A8gles%20suivantes%2C%20qui%20permettent%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralement%20d'%C3%A9valuer%20correctement%20la%20capacit%C3%A9%20de%20g%C3%A9n%C3%A9ralisation%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%2C%20ind%C3%A9pendamment%20de%20sa%20nature%20(r%C3%A9gression%20lin%C3%A9aire%2C%20polynomiale%2C%20SVM%2C%20for%C3%AAt%20al%C3%A9atoire%20etc..).%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20**Underfitting**%20(biais%20elev%C3%A9%20%24%5CRightarrow%24%20plateau%20%C3%A9lev%C3%A9%20et%20variance%20faible%20(donc%20faible%20%C3%A9cart))%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20-%20Les%20deux%20courbes%20convergent%20vers%20un%20plateau%20associ%C3%A9%20%C3%A0%20une%20erreur%20%C3%A9lev%C3%A9e%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20-%20Faible%20%C3%A9cart%20asymptotique%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20**Overfitting**%20(variance%20%C3%A9lev%C3%A9e%20%24%5CRightarrow%24%20%C3%A9cart%20marqu%C3%A9%20et%20biais%20faible%20(plateau%20bas))%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20-%20Erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20basse%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20-%20%C3%89cart%20asymptotique%20important%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20**Bon%20ajustement**%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20-%20Faible%20erreur%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20-%20Faible%20%C3%A9cart%0A%0A%20%20%20%20-%20**Pas%20assez%20de%20donn%C3%A9es**%0A%20%20%20%20%20%20-%20Les%20deux%20courbes%20sont%20encore%20en%20mouvement%20au%20bord%20droit%0A%0A%20%20%20%20%3E%20Certains%20aspects%20de%20ces%20courbes%20restent%20largement%20imputables%20%C3%A0%20la%20nature%20du%20mod%C3%A8le%2C%20notamment%20le%20fait%20que%20l'erreur%20d'entra%C3%AEnement%20augmente%20%2F%20reste%20proche%20de%200%2C%20ou%20que%20l'%C3%A9cart%20se%20r%C3%A9sorbe%20%2F%20persiste%20avec%20les%20donn%C3%A9es.%0A%0A%20%20%20%20On%20en%20d%C3%A9duit%2C%20%5Bcomme%20pr%C3%A9vu%5D(%23implementation-scikit)%20%3A%0A%20%20%20%201.%20_Learning%20curve%20%3A%20plot%20n%C2%B01_%20exhibe%20un%20ph%C3%A9nom%C3%A8ne%20d'underfitting%20(plateau%20%2B%20faible%20%C3%A9cart)%0A%20%20%20%202.%20_Learning%20curve%20%3A%20plot%20n%C2%B02_%20illustre%20un%20ph%C3%A9nom%C3%A8ne%20d'overfitting%20(erreur%20faible%20%2B%20%C3%A9cart%20marqu%C3%A9)%0A%20%20%20%20%22%22%22)%0A%20%20%20%20return%0A%0A%0Aif%20__name__%20%3D%3D%20%22__main__%22%3A%0A%20%20%20%20app.run()%0A f37adcf3cf5b0ecc44232d9cb707304f
